name: pzzld
description: A collection of custom Claude plugins seeking to maximize the tools native to the Claude harness in meaningful manners.

plugins.name: myfi
plugins.description: An all-in-one financial plugin with a wall-street grade financial planner alongside a custom toolkit and supported with various related skills ensuring a QUANT level understanding of market conditions.

plugins.name: shepherd
plugins.description: Sprint-by-sprint version-cycle conductor. Six-agent flock (engineer, critic, coder, auditor, worker, discovery) on a three-section pipeline (INTRODUCTION → BODY → CLOSE), with hardened hooks, hypothesis-driven audits, and a per-project SQLite context registry. Configured per-project via .claude/shepherd.toml.
